title: Change/New Feature Request for Timeline column
excerpt:
Would be nice if the Timeline dates be manually entered (typed in) just like can be done in the Date column.

posts.author: chris.schock (Chris Schock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be nice if the Timeline dates be manually entered (typed in) just like can be done in the Date column.

When duplicating a board, i.e. for applications such as a monthly or annual checklist, it is very time consuming to have to use the date picker to reselect the dates a year later.

Would be much easier to have the manual option to change the dates similar to the Date column.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Chris! Did you vote and see the updates for our new timeline features? Start and end time in date column

posts.author: RebeccaC (Rebecca C)
posts.cookedHtml: Many of our users are also asking for this function, having to scroll through the calendar is not user friendly. This update in the “Date” type of column is helpful and would be great if it was replicated in “Timeline” type column.
